violations.text: Deli Meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026
The non food contact surfaces of the three bay was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The wall behind the chopping prep table is constructed material that is not smooth durable and easily cleanable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 03/01/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener and slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener and slicer were cleaned and sanitized at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Various food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Food was moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
The gasket for the 1 door glass reach in was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

Wood is used in the construction of the freezer top. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023

At time of inspection there was no employee trained in food safety. An on-site manager certified in food safety is required at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023

The walls behind the deli slicer are painted. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2023
